title: Manimekalai inherits Madhavi and Kovalan's public history
claim_or_observation: Manimekalai is the daughter of Madhavi and Kovalan and enters a world shaped by performance lineage public reputation grief and the Madurai catastrophe
notes: Create original-text and cross-epic lineage concordance

title: Exact numerical age is unresolved
claim_or_observation: The present research does not establish one verified numerical age for Manimekalai

title: Manimekalai is publicly read through beauty
claim_or_observation: Flowers hair eyes bangles youth and beauty affect how others perceive and pursue her
notes: Separate poetic convention from plot-driving description

title: Refusal is expressed through repeated action
claim_or_observation: Manimekalai leaves withdraws disguises herself accepts discipline and redirects her life rather than accepting the future others assign
notes: Map direct speech versus action-based refusal

title: Manipallavam disclosure exceeds immediate emotional integration
claim_or_observation: Divine transport past-life memory sacred landscape and responsibility arrive in rapid sequence
notes: Character performance must preserve disorientation and emotional processing

title: Amudhasurabhi changes private escape into public responsibility
claim_or_observation: Receiving and using the vessel makes Manimekalai responsible for strangers and public feeding

title: Service develops practical and institutional knowledge
claim_or_observation: Manimekalai's compassion operates through alms crowd service prison reform and inclusive famine relief
notes: Connect character performance with logistics and public authority

title: Disguise carries embodied and social consequences
claim_or_observation: Manimekalai's altered forms change recognition access danger voice and responsibility
notes: Do not reduce transformations to costume changes

title: Prince's death creates grief and responsibility conflict
claim_or_observation: The death follows pursuit mistaken recognition jealousy and violence and requires Manimekalai to interpret causation without accepting false legal blame
notes: Verify exact emotional response in Tamil

title: Queen conflict tests compassion without submission
claim_or_observation: Manimekalai faces confinement deprivation and coercion and later addresses Rajamadevi's grief and actions

title: Philosophical arc moves from hearing to testing and practice
claim_or_observation: Manimekalai hears rival positions studies reasoning and connects causal teaching with conduct and suffering
notes: Do not give mature vocabulary before training

title: Withdrawal is an incomplete early solution
claim_or_observation: Manimekalai initially relies on distance secrecy and withdrawal for safety but later develops chosen public obligation
notes: Core psychological arc requiring screenplay review

title: Supernatural capacity is not emotional invulnerability
claim_or_observation: Divine transport memory transformations mantras and the vessel do not remove fear fatigue grief uncertainty or consequence
notes: Binding writing performance VFX and publicity rule

title: Voice develops by dramatic function
claim_or_observation: Her voice moves from protective economy through questioning and operational service toward disciplined philosophical inquiry

title: Body retains artistic household history
claim_or_observation: Rhythm balance posture and spatial awareness remain plausible traces of upbringing in Madhavi's trained performance household
notes: Do not claim professional mastery not established by text

title: Spiritual stillness is not emotional absence
claim_or_observation: The final performance must not represent liberation as vacancy colourlessness or inability to feel attachment grief anger or care
